titleStmt.title: SII 41.121: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 121. (A.R. No. 120 of 1905.) Tiruvālīśvaram, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District. On a pillar set up near the balipītha the Vālīśvara temple at Tiruvālīśvaram.

summary.p: This contains a long eulogy of the military body called Mūṉṟukai-mahāsēṉai (‘the great army having the three sections’). From the details it may be understood that it refers to the Chōḻa army. Among the martial achievements of the body are mentioned their victories in several battles like Mātōṭṭam (in Sri Lanka), Banavāsi, Uchchanti, Ettakkiri, Bādāmi against the Chēras, the Chāḷukyas, etc. The main purpose of the inscription is to record that the precincts and the entire establishment (including the Śivabrāhmaṇas, the carpenters, smiths, etc) of the Tiruvālīśvaram temple are under the protection of the army people. Anyone who dies fighting for the protection of the temple was assured of honour and protection to their kith and kin for ever.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . ceṅka
malattirumaṭa
ntai tām viru
mpun tiruv(ā)ḷar
tiṅkaḷ caṭaik
kātta pirāṉ tirup
pātam viruppāti
Aṅkaikaḷāl
malartūvi Aṉa
varatan toḻutetti
k kaṉṉaraṉaik keṭat
turantu kāṅkeyaṉai
k koṉṟu kalmāṭaṅ
kaikkoṇṭu kaṭal vi
ḻiñamaḷittu maṟukaṭa
lai Ūṭaṟuttu māto
ṭṭam poṭipaṭuttu ma
lai nāṭu koṇṭu
cālai kalamaṟu
ttu maṉṉukāḷa
tti tamiṭ pulavōr
pāṭa tiru vallāṉai
k keṭatturantu va
ṉavāci koṇṭu ku
ccimalaiyaraṇaḻi
ttu Uccanti koṇ
ṭu Etir poruta vaṭuki
riya Eḻilattayila
ṉañca Ettakkiriko
ṇṭa kūṟṟamaṉṉaca
ṟi koḷā Oḷḷiḷai yā
ṉai naṭuṅka
yaṉṉiru puḷḷi
mattu vantoṭikkut
ti vātāvi yaraṇa
ḻittu p
pai koṇṭu pun
malai nāṭaṉun
tam piyum virun
tamum malaitaṉ
ṉilakappaṭa piṭittu
veṅkaṟ kaḻittu
viritalai vaṭukarai
koṅkalar kulāvu
kulak kecariyai ta
ṉ kulamaṟutta pā
ṇṭināṭar pataiyā
kkalikaḷ muṉṟukai
mahāseṉaiyo
m tiruvāliśvaramu
ṭaiya tiripuratāṉapa
ṇṇiṉa cevakaṉār
tirumukkāl vaṭṭa
mum Ittevar te
vatāṉaṅkaḷum pa
lapaṇi nimantakkā
rarum śrīpaṇṭāramum
civa bbirāmaṇa(r)
rum tiruppaṇicey
yun taccar kollaru
m tiruveḷaikā
ṟaṉ Aṟampaṭai pi
ṭitta pallāyira
var kāppu Ivva
ṟattukku Aḻivupu
kāma ruṅ kēṭṭu
m kāttāṉukku cantirā
ticca palamum Avaṉ
vaṟkāti Uḷḷa taṉai
yum Utirappaṭṭiyum
Āṉaiyum mālaiyu
m Uḷḷiṭṭa sarvvapari
cāraṅkaḷellām pe
ṟuvatāka Amaippuñ
camaippuṅ kuṭuttōm
muṉṟukai mahāsa
ṉaiyom§
Digital edition of SII 41.121 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
